# Gcore Edge Proxy

> Review Edge Proxy DDoS protection concepts - Anycast IP routing, translation rules, application type profiles, and multi-terabit filtering at CDN edge PoPs.

- [Overview](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/overview.md): Review Edge Proxy DDoS protection concepts - Anycast IP routing, translation rules, application type profiles, and multi-terabit filtering at CDN edge PoPs.
- [Setup and configuration](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/setup-and-configuration.md): Configure Edge Proxy DDoS protection by adding port mappings (port, protocol, and application type) to receive a protected IP endpoint for the origin server.
- [Manage Edge Proxy](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/manage-edge-proxy.md): View, edit, and delete Edge Proxy protected IPs and monitor traffic metrics including inbound, blocked, and clean traffic charts.
- [FAQs and trobleshooting](https://docs.gcore.com/edge-proxy/faqs-and-trobleshooting.md): Troubleshoot Edge Proxy issues and find answers to common questions about setup, DNS configuration, application types, and traffic connectivity.
